title: Path Tracer
description: A vanilla-friendly way to discover new paths & leave the ones you need to build your world.
body:
![Path Tracer Heatmap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b7a80ef0355b32ca4aaf0566ff656e0f66860be_0.webp)
# 🗺️ Path Tracer
See exactly where you've been. Path Tracer renders a real-time color heatmap overlay on the ground showing your most-traveled routes — no commands, no maps, just a live visual layer on your world. NEW: Explorer Mode shows a color coded path of your walking history – great for caving & complicated areas!

## How It Works
Every block you walk on gets tracked. The more you travel over a spot, the hotter its color becomes: 

### Path Mode
- 🟢 Green → lightly traveled
- 🟡 Yellow → moderate use
- 🟠 Orange → frequent path
- 🔴 Red → heavily worn route

Tiles below your minimum threshold stay invisible, so only your real paths show up. Path Tracer records the block you're standing on plus the 8 surrounding blocks with each step, creating a natural-looking footprint rather than a single-block trail.

### Explorer Mode
- 🟢 Green  → walked in the last 1 day
- 🟢🔵 Cyan  → walked yesterday
- 🔵 Blue  → walked 2 days ago
- ⚫️ Dark Grey  → older paths

The path gradient can be adjusted from 1 - 14 days, stretching out the gradient progression. Dark Grey is always your oldest paths.


## Features
- Live heatmap overlay — updates as you walk, no reload needed 
- Fully configurable via Mod Menu — adjust min/max walk counts, render radius, and how long data persists 
- Option to set Clear Area keybind (clears out paths within a radius of the player)
- Set keybinds to enable/disable (H), switch modes, & remove paths near you
- Ability to track movement for all loaded players in multiplayer (for building paths for shared builds)
- Client-side only — works on any server, no mod required server-side, no world modifications — purely visual.


## Configuration (via Mod Menu)
**Footprint Size**: 1x1, 3x3, or 5x5

**Min Walk Count**: How many passes before a tile becomes visible 

**Max Walk Count**: The count at which a tile reaches full red 

**Render Radius**: How far from the player tiles are drawn (blocks) 

**Max Age**: How many in-game days before old data fades out

**Track Other Players**: Ability to have other players create heatmap paths when in your loaded chunks (set to Off by default if it feels too cheaty).

**Clear All Dimensions**: Clear all paths across all dimensions.


Compatibility Minecraft: 1.21.11 & 26.1.2

Mod loader: Fabric 

Mod Menu: Optional, recommended for in-game config

Path Tracer is a lightweight client mod — your server friends will never know it's there.
